title: In Parliament | Andrew Cooper MP
meta_description: Find about about the work of Andrew Cooper MP in Parliament.
text_excerpt: --> In Parliament | Andrew Cooper MP top of page Menu Close Home Latest News Help and Advice Contact Me Surgeries In Parliament In Parliament Visiting Parliament When Parliament is in session Free tours, run for constituents by Houses of Parliament tour guides, happen on the following days and times while Parliament is sitting: Monday 9am – 12pm Tuesday 9am – 9:50am Tuesday 10:15am – 12pm Wednesday 9am – 9:50am Wednesday 10:15am - 12pm Friday 3:30pm – 5pm Tours take approximately 75 minutes. Please drop me an email at andrew.cooper.mp@parliament.uk for further details. When Parliament is in recess Outside of the session, Parliament offers tours on a commercial basis. For more information, visit the UK parliament website . My work in Parliament You can find out more about my voting record, written contributions, and spoken contributions on the UK Parliament website . Raising issues I regularly raise issues on behalf constituents, businesses and organisations in Mid Cheshire. This can be privately, by writing to the relevant ministers, departments or officials, or in public in the House of Commons chamber. ​ Do you have an issues you would like me to raise? Get in touch . Early day motions I regret that as a point of principle, I do not sign any Early Day Motions except in exceptional circumstances. However, I am happy to discuss ways we can get issues on the national agenda and effect meaningful change. Please get in touch if I can help. 0207 219 7479 andrew.cooper.mp@parliament.uk Unit 23 Meridian House, Road One Industrial Estate, Winsford, CW7 3QG Facebook Twitter TikTok bottom of page
